blended.narrative: Revelstoke Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.2 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,852 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.5" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: light rain showers, highs of 52°F.
